cards.name: 6 of Wands
cards.interpretation: success, victory, triumph, rewards, recognition, praise, acclaim, pride

cards.name: 3 of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: teamwork, shared goals, collaboration, apprenticeship, effort, pooling energy

cards.name: 4 of Wands, reversed
cards.interpretation: lack of support, instability, feeling unwelcome, transience, lack of roots, home conflict
